summary: Backend-only testing completed for Turkish Telegram betting bot. All 29 tests passed. Verified API endpoints, premium helper logic, and bot handler registrations.

minor.issue: Documentation inconsistency: Message says 'Günde 5 kupon' but FREE_DAILY_LIMIT is 3. Should say 'Günde 3 kupon'

action_items: Fix format_premium_info() in premium_helper.py line 131: Change 'Günde 5 kupon' to 'Günde 3 kupon' to match FREE_DAILY_LIMIT=3
critical_code_review_comments: premium_helper.py line 131: format_premium_info() says 'Günde 5 kupon' but FREE_DAILY_LIMIT=3 - inconsistent documentation
test_credentials: No auth required for API endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working. Premium system fully tested. Bot handlers verified. One minor doc inconsistency found in format_premium_info(). Telegram bot cannot be tested via HTTP - uses polling.

premium_helper: is_premium_active returns False for non-premium user
is_premium_active returns True for active premium user
is_premium_active returns False for expired premium

mocked_apis_note: AI analyzer has fallback predictions when LLM fails (as documented)
